last_prompt: Implement intelligent task routing and scheduling in ralph_loop.rs. Instead of simple phase-based ordering, add a scoring system that considers: task priority, estimated complexity, dependency satisfaction, number of previous failed attempts, and time since last attempt. Add a TaskScheduler struct that encapsulates this logic and returns an ordered list of ready tasks. This replaces the simple ready_task_indices method with a smarter selection strategy. Add unit tests.
